% Auto-generated PGFPlots figure for scene_layout
% Requires: \usepackage{pgfplots,pgfplotstable,xcolor}
% Optional: \usepgfplotslibrary{groupplots}
\providecommand{\postprocessfigurewidth}{\linewidth}
\pgfplotsset{compat=1.18}
\definecolor{CentralMassiveMimoColor}{HTML}{D4A017}
\definecolor{DistributedFixedColor}{HTML}{2F5D8A}
\definecolor{DistributedMovableColor}{HTML}{CB3A2A}
\begin{tikzpicture}
  \begin{axis}[
    width=\postprocessfigurewidth,
    height=0.78\postprocessfigurewidth,
    xlabel={x [m]},
    ylabel={y [m]},
    axis equal image,
    grid=major,
    legend pos=north east,
    unbounded coords=jump,
  ]
    \addplot[black, line width=1.0pt] table[x=x_m,y=y_m,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/scene_layout_boundary.csv};
    \addplot[gray!70, line width=0.8pt] table[x=x_m,y=y_m,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/scene_layout_buildings.csv};
    \addplot[gray!50, line width=0.5pt] table[x=x_m,y=y_m,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/scene_layout_walk_edges.csv};
    \addplot[orange!85!black, line width=0.9pt] table[x=x_m,y=y_m,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/scene_layout_trajectories.csv};
    \addplot[only marks, mark=square*, mark size=2pt, color=DistributedFixedColor] table[x=x_m,y=y_m,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/scene_layout_candidate_sites.csv};
    \addlegendentry{Candidate APs}
    \addplot[only marks, mark=triangle*, mark size=3pt, color=DistributedMovableColor] table[x=x_m,y=y_m,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/scene_layout_selected_sites.csv};
    \addlegendentry{Selected APs}
    \addplot[only marks, mark=star, mark size=4pt, color=CentralMassiveMimoColor, mark options={solid, fill=CentralMassiveMimoColor, draw=black}] table[x=x_m,y=y_m,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/scene_layout_central_massive_mimo.csv};
    \addlegendentry{Central massive-MIMO BS}
    \addplot[only marks, mark=*, mark size=2.5pt, color=green!50!black] table[x=x_m,y=y_m,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/scene_layout_ue_start.csv};
    \addlegendentry{UE start}
    \addplot[only marks, mark=x, mark size=2.5pt, color=orange!85!black] table[x=x_m,y=y_m,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/scene_layout_ue_end.csv};
    \addlegendentry{UE end}
  \end{axis}
\end{tikzpicture}
